REMITTITUR FILED SUPERIOR COURT DETERMINES THAT APPELLANT'S CONTENTIONS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE PREJUDICIAL ERROR. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED THAT MUNICIPAL COURT JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED. PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1034 AND CRC 135 (A, B & C), COSTS ARE HEREBY AWARDED TO THE PREVAILING PARTY.
